## A suite of HiPo assessment tools, customized to measure your talent potential

A mix of virtual and human intervention to accurately analyze and deliver on organizational needs

![]()

Hipo Tools

A fully online, location-agnostic tool to quickly and accurately assess your employees

### 360-degree feedback tool

Gain a holistic understanding of your employees by undertaking a 360-degree feedback

[](/360-degree-feedback-tool/)

## The Mercer | Mettl Model Identifies High-Potential Employees Who Possess Intellect, Drive, Agility and Leadership

![]()

intellect

### Intellect

High intellect to successfully handle challenges and take effective decisions 
 
Involves: Strategic Thinking and Critical Decision Making

![]()

agility

### Agility

Ability to move quickly and easily, effectively handling ambiguity and not giving up 
 
Involves: Navigating Ambiguity and Adaptability

![]()

drive

### Drive

Relentless determination to learn, grow and succeed 
 
Involves: Drive to Excel, Learning Orientation and Initiative

![]()

leadership

### Leadership

Potential to lead by influencing both internal & external stakeholders to achieve organizational goals 
 
Involves: Propensity to Lead & Stakeholder Mgmt.

## Analyze performance vs. potential with the 9-Box Model

![]()

Identify

Performance

≠

Potential

Performance reflects the past

Potential is a window to the future

!()
